note: POV (kodifitzwell) shipped as a Gears ALTERNATIVE (optional). changelog: 0.1.1: re-merged onto clean POV 6.07.08. Upstream refactored modules/sources.py results/thread machinery (wait() -> thread_monitor()+progress_update(), removed random.shuffle, as_completed flow); our kodirdil Hebrew-subs thread + GearsAI prefetch trigger (top of get_sources) re-applied by 3-way merge, verified leak-free (0 upstream lines lost, valid AST). 0.1.0: initial Hebrew overlay re-derived fresh from the current Gears overlay (kodirdil) onto clean POV 6.07.07.
